html:
2026-0548
2026-06-04FINCustoms TariffRefined Sugar Anti-dumping Duty Remission Order, 2026Refined Sugar Anti-dumping Duty Remission Order, 2026 in order to (1) allow the Government to remit $196,047 in anti-dumping duties paid by Bagos Bun Bakery and $68,000 in anti-dumping duties paid by Heritage Coffee with respect to importations of refined sugar from the United States between June and July 2022; and (2) set out the conditions for granting remission, including that the importer make a claim to the Minister of Public Safety and Emergency Preparedness within two years after the day on which the Order comes into force.Registration: SOR/2026-0108 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
subject: Refined Sugar Anti-dumping Duty Remission Order, 2026
precis: Refined Sugar Anti-dumping Duty Remission Order, 2026 in order to (1) allow the Government to remit $196,047 in anti-dumping duties paid by Bagos Bun Bakery and $68,000 in anti-dumping duties paid by Heritage Coffee with respect to importations of refined sugar from the United States between June and July 2022; and (2) set out the conditions for granting remission, including that the importer make a claim to the Minister of Public Safety and Emergency Preparedness within two years after the day on which the Order comes into force.
